_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your own details. config.json is gitignored so your personal profile stays local. Delete this _comment field in your copy.
intellectual_profile: This is a personal media catalog — a structured record of the books, films, and music that have shaped how I think and work. It isn't a comprehensive survey of any field, but a working record of what I've actually read, watched, and listened to, and how those things connect to each other. Edit this paragraph in config.json to describe your own collection.
profile_closer: A working library, not an institutional survey. Edit this in config.json.
cross_cutting_threads: Cross-cutting threads and relationships are traced via the `in_conversation_with` graph in the full catalog.
_cluster_min_size_note: Minimum number of entries a theme must have to become its own cluster. Lower = more granular clusters. Higher = broader clusters with more in Miscellaneous.
_max_overview_clusters_note: Maximum number of clusters to list in CONTEXT_OVERVIEW.md. The largest clusters are kept; the rest are omitted from the overview but still appear in compact/full.
